name: update_quiz

selectedValue.description: Required when `action` is `selectOption`. Provide the option's value (e.g., `50-75k`, `yes`). Match the `options[].value` used in the quiz.

questionId.description: Stable identifier of the current question (e.g., `employment`, `salary_range`). Infer from the ongoing quiz context.

action.description: One of `selectOption`, `nextQuestion`, `prevQuestion`, `showResults`. Choose based on user intent (e.g., “select option two”, “next”, “go back”, “show results”).
